title: Drone attack damages Kuwait airport as U.S.-Iran strikes widen
summary_full: One person was killed in an Iranian attack on Kuwait International Airport after U.S. forces targeted an Iranian military station on an island in the Strait of Hormuz.
summary_public: One person was killed in an Iranian attack on Kuwait International Airport after U.S. forces targeted an Iranian military station on an island in the Strait of Hormuz.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iranian attack on Kuwait International Airport
